title: Structure of a ball bearing type small reciprocating compressor
abstract: The structure of a ball bearing type small reciprocating compressor according to the present invention comprises: a block; a tubular cylinder coupled to the block; a valve assembly comprising a suction valve and a discharge valve to block a front end of the cylinder; a valve cover covering the valve assembly to form a suction space and a discharge space on an upper part of the valve assembly; at least one pressing bolt coupling the valve cover and the block so as to press the cylinder between the valve cover and the block; a piston conducting linear reciprocating motion in the cylinder; a stator coupled to the block; a rotor located to rotate relative to the stator; a rotation shaft coupled to the rotor to rotate integrally with the rotor so as to be rotatable and axially supported to the block; a crank part converting a rotation motion of the rotation shaft to a linear reciprocating motion of the piston; a connecting rod formed with an insertion cylindrical part and a rod part into which a journal and a bearing of the crank part are inserted; and an upper ball bearing and a lower ball bearing installed on an upper part and a lower part of the rotation shaft, respectively, wherein the lower ball bearing is installed inside an insertion cylindrical part protrudingly formed in the middle of the lower housing.
claims: Claims ( 5 ) A piston coupling structure of a small reciprocating compressor, comprising: a block 40; a tubular cylinder 50 coupled to the block 40; a valve assembly 70 comprising a suction valve and a discharge valve to block a front end of the cylinder; a valve cover 80 covering the valve assembly to form a suction space 81a and a discharge space 81b on an upper part of the valve assembly 70; at least one pressing bolt 90 coupling the valve cover 80 and the block 40 so as to press the cylinder 50 between the valve cover 80 and the block 40; a piston 60 conducting linear reciprocating motion in the cylinder 50; a stator 21 coupled to the block 40; a lower housing 11 coupled to a lower supporting frame 21A fixing the stator 21; a rotor 25 located to rotate relative to the stator 21; a rotation shaft 30 coupled to the rotor 25 to rotate integrally with the rotor 25 so as to be rotatable and axially supported to the block 40; a crank part 32 converting a rotation motion of the rotation shaft 30 to a linear reciprocating motion of the piston 60; a connecting rod 34 formed with an insertion cylindrical part 34A and a rod part 34B into which a journal 32A and a bearing 32B of the crank part 32 are inserted; and an upper ball bearing 30A and a lower ball bearing 30B installed on an upper part and a lower part of the rotation shaft 30, respectively, wherein the lower ball bearing 30B is installed inside an insertion cylindrical part 11B protrudingly formed in the middle of the lower housing 11. The structure of the small reciprocating compressor of claim 1, wherein the upper ball bearing 30A inserted in an upper part of the rotation shaft 30 is rotatable and axially supported to the block 40, and the lower ball bearing 30B inserted in a lower part of the rotation shaft 30 is inserted into a lower ball bearing insertion cylindrical part 11B of the lower housing 11 to be axially supported thereto, and a vibration isolation spring 23 is installed on the fixed plate seat 22 coupled to a lower part of the lower housing 11. The piston coupling structure of a small reciprocating compressor of claim 1, wherein the connecting rod 34 comprises a rod part 34B at one side of the insertion cylindrical part 34A, and has a coupling hole 34C formed in one side of the rod part 34B. The piston coupling structure of a small reciprocating compressor of claim 1, wherein the piston 60 has an O-ring 60C, which is a sealing member, interposed between a piston supporter 60A at one side and a stopper 60B at the other side, and has a protrusion 60B' of the stopper 60B insertedly coupled to a depression 60A' of the supporter 60A and the O-ring 60C insertedly coupled along the protrusion 60B' of the stopper 60B. The piston coupling structure of a small reciprocating compressor of claim 3, wherein the piston 60 is coupled to the connecting rod 34 by inserting a coupling bolt 60D in coupling holes 60A-1 and 60B-1 made in the supporter 60A and the stopper 60B, respectively so as to be coupled to a coupling hole 34C formed in one side of the rod part 34B of the connecting rod 34.
